source_note: NY PSC Order Initiating a Management and Operations Audit, Case 23-M-0103 (5 pp) — commences the PSL §66(19) comprehensive management and operations audit of NYSEG and RG&E that produced the February 2025 NorthStar final report. Issued at the Commission session held May 18, 2023.
